description: AI exploits Against All Odds (Lions of the Emperor): the P1 Custodes army is teleported into a realistic mid-game spread where every eligible unit holds the 6" bubble (14 units with +1 Hit / +1 Wound live). P1 (AI at Hard) then plays its movement phase for real. Asserts (a) the movement plan narrates the Against All Odds spacing doctrine in the left game-log panel, (b) end-state isolation is at least the measured pre-change baseline (the old AI ended this exact seeded phase with 2 isolated units; the spacing-aware AI holds 3+ via lane fans, standoff rings and per-marker commit caps — congestion in an all-out push is physical, so the floor is the regression bar, and the mechanism correctness lives in tests/unit/test_ai_against_all_odds.gd), (c) no unit loss. Screenshots capture the spread start, the AI thinking cards, and the end state.
